description.ko: 부드러운 생물발광 사이펀 그릇들이 고요한 수중 안개 속으로 액체 빛을 내쉰다.
description.en: Soft bioluminescent siphon-vessels breathe liquid light into a calm underwater mist.

prompt: AURA-7 organic flow artwork, "Abyssal Exhale Vessels": a serene deep underwater chamber where clusters of soft translucent siphon-vessels hover above a shadowed seafloor, shaped like breathing sea-glass organs rather than flowers, pods, ribbons, or membranes. Each vessel has thick #7FB069 gelatin walls with muted #2D5A3D rootlike shadows suspended inside, gently swelling as slow currents pass through their hollow cores. Warm #FFE66D bioluminescent liquid light collects in the lower cavities, rises in slow spiral streams, spills from oval pores, and unfurls into long glowing tendrils that drift upward through a pale #E6F2E1 marine mist. The water is filled with dense luminous plankton, pearly microbubbles, suspended organic motes, faint green caustic shimmer, wet translucent textures, soft internal radiance, layered abyssal depth, and calm motion blur. Emphasize breathing natural light, flowing liquid illumination, serene organic life, high particle density, no figures, no machinery, no architecture, no hard geometry, no rigid symmetry, no cosmic setting.
